case_title: RICH PAGEANT, LLC VS. JOHN KANE et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOHN KANE, IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO OCT-03-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JEREMY FORTES--CREATIVE DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN KANE--MANAGING DIRECTOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
